name: [BUG-GW-003] TC-GW-004 — Server response header must not disclose APISIX version
description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-GW-003]**

**What this test does:**
Calls GET /spr-fetcher/api/v1/fetch/status and inspects the Server response header.

**Expected:** Server header is absent or contains a generic value (e.g. "API Gateway")
**Actual:** Server: APISIX/3.16.0

**Why this is a security concern:**
Advertising the specific gateway software and version gives attackers a starting point:
1. They can look up CVEs specific to APISIX 3.16.0
2. They can craft exploit attempts targeting known vulnerabilities in that version
3. They can confirm which gateway is in use, helping map the infrastructure

**This is an OWASP A05:2021 Security Misconfiguration finding.**

**Fix:** In the APISIX configuration, set the "server_tokens" option to "false" or configure a custom Server header value that does not disclose the product or version.

steps.name: Step 1 — Send GET /spr-fetcher/api/v1/fetch/status and inspect Server header
Step 2 — Assert Server header does not disclose version (BUG: APISIX/3.16.0)
[BUG-GW-003] Server header must not disclose version number, got: "RMS-Gateway"
